assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 7 of claude-md-result.md: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the expected values exactly (Role: Rust backend service, Serena Instance: serena_backend, Path: /home/user/trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8 of claude-md-result.md: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new trustify-ui row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 12-16 of claude-md-result.md contain: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747' — all match the expected values from claude-md-configured.md exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## Preserved (unchanged)' section explicitly listing trustify-backend as 'preserved as-is', all Jira fields as 'preserved', and Code Intelligence section/limitations as 'preserved as-is'. It has a '## Added (new)' section listing trustify-ui as 'NEW row added' and serena_ui limitation as 'NEW entry added'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 11: serena_backend Status: 'Already configured in Repository Registry' with Action: 'No action required (already in Registry)'. Line 27: serena_ui Status: 'NEW -- not present in existing Repository Registry' with Action: 'Added to Registry with user-provided details'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-21 preserve the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'). Lines 25-29 preserve the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol call). Line 33 preserves the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
